subcodes.first_line: We desire to mention the manifestations of love and affection, that they may swim in the ocean of divine knowledge and praise their Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا اردنا ان نذکر مظاهر المحبه و الوداد لیسبحوا فی بحر العرفان و یسبحوا ربهم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement
